name: Lorenzo Grandi
background: Lorenzo Grandi is President, Finance, Purchasing, ERM and Resilience and Chief Financial Officer of STMicroelectronics, a position he has held since 2018. He is a member of ST’s Executive Committee. Grandi joined SGS-THOMSON Microelectronics (now STMicroelectronics) in 1987. In 1994, he was appointed R&D and Product Design Controller. In 2005, he was promoted to Corporate Vice President, Corporate Control. In 2012, his responsibilities were expanded to include the role of Chief Accounting Officer.

commpanies.name: STMicroelectronics N.V.
commpanies.title_or_role: Chief Financial Officer, President, Finance, Purchasing, ERM and Resilience
